name: io.github.grichardomi/faxseal
title: FaxSeal
description: Send, receive, and verify faxes from AI assistants and agents. Supports faxing from URL or plain text, delivery status, inbox with OCR, and cryptographic attestation via Sigstore/Rekor.

environmentVariables.name: FAXSEAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your FaxSeal API key (fsx_...). Generate one at https://faxseal.com/dashboard/api-tokens
